source.method: USDA TR-55 SCS Curve Number; AMC: Sobhani 1975 / Hawkins 1985

assumptions: SoilGrids texture unavailable; using documented regional default HSG D (Malwa-plateau black-cotton vertisols).
Screening-level: SCS-CN gives runoff volume, not validated flood depth. 328 mm is beyond the method's design-storm range; treat as early-warning, not engineering design.
Ia/S = 0.05 (modern NRCS 2015) primary; 0.2 shown for comparison.
Runoff reported as an antecedent-moisture band (dry/normal/wet), not a point value.
